name: dragos-sitestore
label: Dragos SiteStore
description: Dragos SiteStore is a key component of the Dragos Platform, designed to enhance cybersecurity for industrial control systems (ICS) and operational technology (OT) environments. It serves as the management and reporting console for data collected by Dragos sensors, providing comprehensive visibility and threat detection capabilities.

fields.title: Server URL
fields.description: Specify the URL of the Dragos SiteStore server to connect and perform automated operations.
fields.name: server_url
fields.tooltip: Specify the URL of the Dragos SiteStore server to connect and perform automated operations.

fields.title: API ID
fields.description: Specify the API ID to access the endpoint to connect and perform the automated operations
fields.name: api_id
fields.tooltip: Specify the API ID to access the endpoint to connect and perform the automated operations

fields.title: API Secret
fields.description: Specify the API Secret to access the endpoint to connect and perform the automated operations
fields.name: api_secret
fields.tooltip: Specify the API Secret to access the endpoint to connect and perform the automated operations

fields.title: Verify SSL
fields.description: Specifies whether the SSL certificate for the server is to be verified. By default, this option is set to True.
fields.name: verify_ssl
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the SSL certificate for the server is to be verified. By default, this option is set to True.

operations.title: Get All Assets
operations.description: Retrieves all details associated with an assets from Dragos SiteStore based on the filter parameters that you have specified.

parameters.title: Created After
parameters.description: Select the date and time to filter the results, including only items that created after the specified timestamp.
parameters.name: createdAtAfter
parameters.tooltip: Select the date and time to filter the results, including only items that created after the specified timestamp.

parameters.title: Created Before
parameters.description: Select the date and time to filter the results, including only items that created before the specified timestamp.
parameters.name: createdAtBefore
parameters.tooltip: Select the date and time to filter the results, including only items that created before the specified timestamp.

parameters.title: LastSeen After
parameters.description: Select the date and time to filter the results, including only items that last seen  after the specified timestamp.
parameters.name: lastSeenAtAfter
parameters.tooltip: Select the date and time to filter the results, including only items that last seen after the specified timestamp.

parameters.title: LastSeen Before
parameters.description: Select the date and time to filter the results, including only items that last seen before the specified timestamp.
parameters.name: lastSeenAtBefore
parameters.tooltip: Select the date and time to filter the results, including only items that last seen before the specified timestamp.

parameters.title: Include Deleted Assets
parameters.description: Select the option to include deleted assets in the results from Dragos SiteStore.
parameters.name: is_deleted
parameters.tooltip: Select the option to include deleted assets in the results from Dragos SiteStore.

parameters.title: Overlaps Address Start DateTime
parameters.description: Select the date and time to filter the results, including only items that created after the specified timestamp.
parameters.name: overlaps_starttime
parameters.tooltip: Select the date and time to filter the results, including only items that created after the specified timestamp.

parameters.title: Overlaps Address End DateTime
parameters.description: Select the date and time to filter the results, including only items that created before the specified timestamp.
parameters.name: overlaps_endtime
parameters.tooltip: Select the date and time to filter the results, including only items that created before the specified timestamp.

parameters.title: Mask Address Start DateTime
parameters.description: Select the date and time to filter the results, including only items that created after the specified timestamp.
parameters.name: maskAddress_starttime
parameters.tooltip: Select the date and time to filter the results, including only items that created after the specified timestamp.

parameters.title: Mask Address End DateTime
parameters.description: Select the date and time to filter the results, including only items that created before the specified timestamp.
parameters.name: maskAddress_endtime
parameters.tooltip: Select the date and time to filter the results, including only items that created before the specified timestamp.

parameters.title: Sort By
parameters.description: Select an multiple options in which to sort the assets retrieved. You can choose from the following options: ID, Created At, LastSeen At, First Address ID, First Address Type, First Address Network ID, First Address Value, or Attribute.
parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.tooltip: Select an multiple options in which to sort the assets retrieved. You can choose from the following options: ID, Created At, LastSeen At, First Address ID, First Address Type, First Address Network ID, First Address Value, or Attribute.

parameters.title: Order By
parameters.description: Select a checkbox to order the retrieved assets. If selected, they will be retrieved in descending order.
parameters.name: order_by
parameters.tooltip: Select a checkbox to order the retrieved assets. If selected, they will be retrieved in descending order.

parameters.title: Page Size
parameters.description: Specify the maximum number of results this operation should return, per page, in the response.
parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.tooltip: Specify the maximum number of results this operation should return, per page, in the response.

parameters.title: Page Number
parameters.description: Specifies the page of results to retrieve when pagination is applied. This parameter is used to fetch a specific subset of results based on the page number, helping to break large datasets into manageable chunks.
parameters.name: pageNumber
parameters.tooltip: Specifies the page of results to retrieve when pagination is applied. This parameter is used to fetch a specific subset of results based on the page number, helping to break large datasets into manageable chunks.

parameters.title: Limit Total Count
parameters.description: Specifies the maximum number of results to be returned in the response. This parameter helps control the volume of data by limiting the total count of items in the response.
parameters.name: limitTotalCount
parameters.tooltip: Specifies the maximum number of results to be returned in the response. This parameter helps control the volume of data by limiting the total count of items in the response.

parameters.title: Additional Parameters
parameters.description: Specify additional parameters with which to filter assets in Dragos SiteStore.
parameters.name: additional_fields
parameters.tooltip: Specify additional parameters with which to filter assets in Dragos SiteStore.

operations.title: Get All Notifications
operations.description: Retrieves all details associated with an notifications from Dragos SiteStore based on the filter parameters that you have specified.

parameters.title: Filter
parameters.description: Specify a filter string in FIQL format based on which you want to retrieve notifications. For ex, syntax: fieldname operator value
parameters.name: filter
parameters.tooltip: Specify a filter string in FIQL format based on which you want to retrieve notifications. For ex, syntax: fieldname operator value

parameters.title: Created After
parameters.description: Select the date and time to filter the results, including only items that created after the specified timestamp.
parameters.name: createdAtAfter
parameters.tooltip: Select the date and time to filter the results, including only items that created after the specified timestamp.

parameters.title: State
parameters.description: Specify the state based on which you want to retrieve notifications from Dragos SiteStore. Possible values are RESOLVED or UNRESOLVED
parameters.name: state
parameters.tooltip: Specify the state based on which you want to retrieve notifications from Dragos SiteStore. Possible values are RESOLVED or UNRESOLVED

parameters.title: Sorts
parameters.description: Specify the comma-separated sets of a sort field, colon, and 'a' (for ascending) or 'd' (for descending). Possible values are  id, source, type, createdAt, occurredAt, severity, reviewed, retained, detectorId, firstSourceIp, firstDestinationIp, firstOtherIp, lastSeenAt.
parameters.name: sorts
parameters.tooltip: Specify the comma-separated sets of a sort field, colon, and 'a' (for ascending) or 'd' (for descending). Possible values are  id, source, type, createdAt, occurredAt, severity, reviewed, retained, detectorId, firstSourceIp, firstDestinationIp, firstOtherIp, lastSeenAt.

parameters.title: Sort By
parameters.description: Select an option in which to sort the notifications retrieved. You can choose from the following options: ID, Source, Type, Created At, Occurred At, Severity, Reviewed, etc.
parameters.name: sortField
parameters.tooltip: Select an option in which to sort the notifications retrieved. You can choose from the following options: ID, Source, Type, Created At, Occurred At, Severity, Reviewed, etc.

parameters.title: Order By
parameters.description: Select a checkbox to order the retrieved notifications. If selected, they will be retrieved in descending order. By default, this option is set to False.
parameters.name: sortDescending
parameters.tooltip: Select a checkbox to order the retrieved notifications. If selected, they will be retrieved in descending order. By default, this option is set to False.

parameters.title: Resolve Children Depth
parameters.description: Specify the number of steps deep to recursively resolve child notifications
parameters.name: resolveChildrenDepth
parameters.tooltip: Specify the number of steps deep to recursively resolve child notifications

parameters.title: Offset
parameters.description: Specify the number of records to skip when retrieving records from Dragos SiteStore server.
parameters.name: offset
parameters.tooltip: Specify the number of records to skip when retrieving records from Dragos SiteStore server.

parameters.title: Page Size
parameters.description: Specify the maximum number of results this operation should return, per page, in the response. Note: By default, it will be fetch 10 records and maximum 1000 records.
parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.tooltip: Specify the maximum number of results this operation should return, per page, in the response. By default, it will be fetch 10 records and maximum 1000 records.

parameters.title: Page Number
parameters.description: Specifies the page of results to retrieve when pagination is applied. This parameter is used to fetch a specific subset of results based on the page number, helping to break large datasets into manageable chunks.
parameters.name: pageNumber
parameters.tooltip: Specifies the page of results to retrieve when pagination is applied. This parameter is used to fetch a specific subset of results based on the page number, helping to break large datasets into manageable chunks.

parameters.title: Limit Total Count
parameters.description: Specifies the maximum number of results to be returned in the response. This parameter helps control the volume of data by limiting the total count of items in the response.
parameters.name: limitTotalCount
parameters.tooltip: Specifies the maximum number of results to be returned in the response. This parameter helps control the volume of data by limiting the total count of items in the response.

parameters.title: Additional Parameters
parameters.description: Specify additional parameters with which to filter notifications in Dragos SiteStore.
parameters.name: additional_fields
parameters.tooltip: Specify additional parameters with which to filter notifications in Dragos SiteStore.

operations.title: Get Notifications Details
operations.description: Retrieves a details for one or more notifications from Dragos SiteStore based on the notification ID's and other input parameters that you have specified.

parameters.title: Notification IDs
parameters.description: Specify the comma-separated sets of a notification ID's you want to retrieve details from Dragos SiteStore.
parameters.name: ids
parameters.tooltip: Specify the comma-separated sets of a notification ID's you want to retrieve details from Dragos SiteStore.

parameters.title: Resolve Children Depth
parameters.description: Specify the number of steps deep to recursively resolve child notifications
parameters.name: resolveChildrenDepth
parameters.tooltip: Specify the number of steps deep to recursively resolve child notifications

parameters.title: Include Conversations
parameters.description: If you selected, conversations should be included with the notification. By default, this option is set to True.
parameters.name: includeConversations
parameters.tooltip: If you selected, conversations should be included with the notification. By default, this option is set to True.

operations.title: Get Statistics of Notification
operations.description: Retrieves a statistics for a specific notification from Dragos SiteStore based on the group by or filter parameters that you have specified.

parameters.title: Group By
parameters.description: Select an multiple options based on which you want to filter response. You can choose from the following options: Type, Source, Severity, Asset ID, Reviewed, etc.
parameters.name: groupBy
parameters.tooltip: Select an multiple options based on which you want to filter response. You can choose from the following options: Type, Source, Severity, Asset ID, Reviewed, etc.

parameters.title: Filter
parameters.description: Specify a filter string in FIQL format based on which you want to retrieve notifications. For ex, syntax: fieldname operator value
parameters.name: filter
parameters.tooltip: Specify a filter string in FIQL format based on which you want to retrieve notifications. For ex, syntax: fieldname operator value

operations.title: Get All Detections
operations.description: Retrieves all detections from Dragos SiteStore based on the filter parameters that you have specified.

parameters.title: Include Fields
parameters.description: Specify a comma-separated list of fields to include, and only those fields, along with other required fields, will be returned in the response.
parameters.name: includeFields
parameters.tooltip: Specify a comma-separated list of fields to include, and only those fields, along with other required fields, will be returned in the response.

parameters.title: Exclude Fields
parameters.description: Specify a comma-separated list of fields to exclude from the detections returned, unless the field is required, in the response.
parameters.name: excludeFields
parameters.tooltip: Specify a comma-separated list of fields to exclude from the detections returned, unless the field is required, in the response.

parameters.description: Specify a comma-separated list of fields based on which you want to filter the response.

operations.title: Execute an API Request
operations.description: Sends an API request to any Dragos SiteStore API endpoint based on specified HTTP method, endpoint, and other input parameters that you have specified, enabling flexible API interactions tailored to user needs.

parameters.name: method
parameters.title: HTTP Method
parameters.description:
Select an HTTP action for the request. You can select from the following options:  

DELETE 

GET 

PATCH 

POST 

PUT

parameters.title: Endpoint
parameters.name: endpoint
parameters.tooltip: Specify the target API URL path for example: assets/api/v4/getAssets
parameters.description: Specify the target API URL path for the request. For example, if the website is https://example.com and URL path is https://example.com/assets/api/v4/getAssets, the endpoint would be assets/api/v4/getAssets.

parameters.title: Query Parameters
parameters.name: query_params
parameters.description: (Optional) Specify any optional parameters to add to the URL and refine the request.

parameters.name: payload
parameters.title: Request Payload
parameters.description: (Optional) Specify data, as JSON, to be sent as the request payload (typically for POST or PUT requests).
